purpose: Rebuild the public Platform V7 homepage typography, editorial hierarchy and mobile header controls in RU, EN and ZH without changing Deal authority, authentication, APIs, banking logic or external integration status.
forbiddenCapabilities: changes to authentication, RBAC, tenant authority or protected routing
changes to Deal state machines, money movement, banking callbacks or reconciliation
changes to API, database schema, infrastructure or deployment topology
claims that unverified government, banking, laboratory or logistics integrations are connected
use of Netlify or Vercel as production infrastructure
